title: Insecure Deserialization

quiz.question: Why is Python pickle dangerous for deserialization?
options: B) It can execute arbitrary code during deserialization
C) It only works with basic types
quiz.answer: B) It can execute arbitrary code during deserialization
quiz.explanation: Pickle uses the __reduce__ method which can execute arbitrary Python code, allowing Remote Code Execution (RCE) attacks.

quiz.question: Which format is a safe alternative to pickle?
quiz.explanation: JSON is a safe serialization format that only supports basic data types and cannot execute code during parsing.

quiz.question: What is the main risk of insecure deserialization?
quiz.explanation: Insecure deserialization can lead to RCE, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary commands on the server.
